description_long: This is a traditional wooden bench with a high backrest and solid side panels, crafted from richly stained wood. The seat is flat and wide, designed to comfortably accommodate multiple people. The backrest features subtle panel detailing, adding a touch of classic elegance. Both ends of the bench have gently curved armrests that flow seamlessly into the side supports. The overall construction appears robust and sturdy, with thick wooden panels forming the legs and sides. The finish is smooth and polished, highlighting the natural grain and warm tone of the wood.
description: A classic, solid wood bench with a high backrest, curved armrests, and a polished finish, designed for multiple users.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, high backrest with panel detailing, and both curved armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, solid side panel and the elegant curve of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full back panel and the sturdy construction of the bench's back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the matching curved armrest and solid side support.
